key.name: focus-left
key.description: Move focus to the window to the left of the current window. In tabbed mode, switches to the previous tab.

key.name: focus-right
key.description: Move focus to the window to the right of the current window. In tabbed mode, switches to the next tab.

key.name: focus-up
key.description: Move focus to the window above the current window.

key.name: focus-down
key.description: Move focus to the window below the current window.

key.name: move-left
key.description: Move the active window one position to the left within its container

key.name: move-right
key.description: Move the active window one position to the right within its container

key.name: move-up
key.description: Move the active window one position up within its container

key.name: move-down
key.description: Move the active window one position down within its container

key.name: toggle-orientation
key.description: Toggles the orientation of the container holding the active window between horizontal and vertical

key.name: reset-ratios
key.summary: Reset container ratios to equal splits
key.description: Resets all window size ratios in the active window's container to equal splits

key.name: toggle-tabbed
key.description: Toggles the active window's container between tabbed and accordion layout modes

key.name: print-tree
key.description: Prints the current tree of containers and windows per monitor to logs
